Footer.sub: Brewed with thirst in Bankya, Bulgaria.

Home.body: Dorst /dɔrst/ — thirst in Dutch. We brew the kind of beer we'd genuinely want to drink: bold styles, honest ingredients, no compromise.
Home.storyTitle: Born from two countries, one thirst
Home.storyP1: Dorst — meaning "thirst" in Dutch — was founded in 2017 as a collaboration between Dean and Erwin: a Bulgarian and a Dutchman who shared an obsession with craft beer done right. We brew in Bankya with one simple mission: to make the beers we'd genuinely want to drink ourselves.
Home.storyP2: No shortcuts. No filler adjuncts. Just honest ingredients, bold recipes, and a whale to watch over it all.
Home.venuesBody: Find us on tap and on the shelf at some of Sofia's best bars and bottle shops. Each venue is handpicked — they care about what they pour.
Home.partnersBody: Access our full range of kegs and cans. Self-serve ordering, real-time inventory, and invoicing built in — no back-and-forth required.

Beers.heading: The Beers
Beers.sub: 10 beers in rotation, each with its own character. No generic craft language — just honest ingredients and deliberate recipes.

About.heading: Our Story
About.sub: Founded by Dean and Erwin in Bankya, 2017.
About.title: Two countries. One thirst.
About.p1: Dorst — meaning "thirst" in Dutch — was founded in 2017 by Dean (Bulgarian) and Erwin (Dutch). They met studying in Oxford, discovered a shared obsession with craft beer, and decided to build a brewery together.
About.p2: The brewery is in Bankya, near Sofia. 4,000+ litres a month. 10 beers in rotation, 20+ styles brewed. Unfiltered, unpasteurised, mostly vegan.
About.p3: No shortcuts. No filler adjuncts. No marketing-speak. Just honest ingredients, deliberate recipes, and a whale to watch over it all.
About.breweryP1: We brew in Bankya, a spa town 18km from Sofia. The water is good. The space is ours. The process is open — we don't hide behind smoke machines or mystique.
About.breweryP2: Every batch is logged, tasted, and adjusted. When a recipe is right, we don't change it. Hippy Shake hasn't changed since 2017. There's been no reason to.
About.mascotP1: The whale isn't a logo. It's a character. Hand-drawn, it appears on every label in a different scene — breaching, winged, swimming through stars. Same whale, different adventure.
About.mascotP2: "Drink well, drink whale!" The tagline is ridiculous on purpose. The whale is the brewery's personality: playful, a little anarchic, entirely itself.
About.tradeBody: Kegs and cans. Self-serve ordering portal at partners.dorst.bg

Underage.heading: Come back when you're older!
Underage.body: Dorst is for adults 18 and over. For now, enjoy the fish.
